ddls:
CREATE TABLE "certifications" (
  "cert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification */,
  "certifying_agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the certifying agency */,
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the worker who obtained the certification */,
  "certificate_no" TEXT /* Certificate number */,
  "issuance_date" TEXT /* Date the certificate was issued */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Start date of the certificate's validity */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* End date of the certificate's validity */,
  "certification_type" TEXT /* Type of certification (e.g., professional, vocational) */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization within the certification (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certifications_certifying_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("certifying_agency_id") REFERENCES certifying_agencies ("certifying_agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certifications_worker_id FOREIGN KEY ("worker_id") REFERENCES workers ("worker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certifying_agencies" (
  "certifying_agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certifying agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the certifying agency */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the certifying agency */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the certifying agency */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the certifying agency is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certifying_agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workers" (
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each worker */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the worker */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the worker */,
  "skill_area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the worker's skill area */,
  "employment_date" TEXT /* Date the worker was employed */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the worker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("worker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workers_skill_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_area_id") REFERENCES skill_areas ("skill_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skill_areas" (
  "skill_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill area */,
  "skill_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the skill area */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the skill area (e.g., technical, business) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certification_renewals" (
  "renewal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each renewal event */,
  "cert_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the certification being renewed */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date of the renewal */,
  "new_valid_to" TEXT /* New end date of the certificate's validity after renewal */,
  "renewal_cost" TEXT /* Cost of the renewal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("renewal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certification_renewals_cert_id FOREIGN KEY ("cert_id") REFERENCES certifications ("cert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the project is executed */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project requirement */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "skill_area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the required skill area */,
  "certifying_agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the certifying agency for the required certification */,
  "required_certifications" INTEGER /* Number of certifications required for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_requirements_certifying_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("certifying_agency_id") REFERENCES certifying_agencies ("certifying_agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_requirements_skill_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_area_id") REFERENCES skill_areas ("skill_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_requirements_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "worker_project_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each worker-project assignment */,
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the worker */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the worker's assignment to the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the worker's assignment to the project */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_worker_project_assignments_worker_id FOREIGN KEY ("worker_id") REFERENCES workers ("worker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_worker_project_assignments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certification_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "cert_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the certification */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certification_alerts_cert_id FOREIGN KEY ("cert_id") REFERENCES certifications ("cert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR, project manager, compliance officer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the CMS was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "resource_accessed" TEXT /* Resource accessed by the user (e.g., certification records, project requirements) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_records" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the worker */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "training_topic" TEXT /* Topic of the training session */,
  "training_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the training session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_records_worker_id FOREIGN KEY ("worker_id") REFERENCES workers ("worker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance evaluation */,
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the worker */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance evaluation */,
  "evaluation_score" TEXT /* Score of the performance evaluation */,
  "evaluation_comments" TEXT /* Comments on the performance evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_evaluations_worker_id FOREIGN KEY ("worker_id") REFERENCES workers ("worker_id")
)
